_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Methods and tools involves setting direction and give others the means and authority to advise on the best methodologies and tools for the work, ensuring they are adopted consistently; assessing the effectiveness of different approaches (such as Agile or plan-driven) and recommend tools to support organisational collaboration and build capability.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-003 (AB, cosine: 0.429), LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.428).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.377). Shared vocabulary: [approaches, methods]. DDaT-only terms [adopted, advise, agile, assessing, authority, best] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, engineering, findings, novel, operationalize, production] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.838, R=0.859). R exceeds P by 0.021 — the WIDAI KSA's 14 words are well-captured by the DDaT element's 50 words, but the DDaT element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Methods and tools involves setting direction and give others the means and autho" and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.520 > STS 0.377 (gap +0.143). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [approaches, methods] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.8%. Shared tokens: [approaches, methods]. DDaT-only: [adopted, advise, agile, assessing, authority, best]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, engineering, findings, novel, operationalize, production].
